title: Graphene Electrostatic Speaker
description: You can buy my book  Graphene 101 An Inventors guide to making graphene at https://www.smashwords.com/books/view/304668 the money will help my research. thanks. This is new! No trying to patent it lol. I put into the public domain for everyone make of it what you will. The Little speaker is a bit rough and ready but there are some easy improvements to be made - Particularly using fractals - an idea sent to me by the indianabiys - cheers boys. The music was provided by www.music4yourvids.com. They provide royalty free music for use on youtube vids even if you are monestising your vidoes - cheers music4yourvids.
